layout.container: min-h-[100dvh] bg-[#0B0E14] text-white flex flex-col relative overflow-hidden font-sans
layout.spacing_scale: Tailwind default extended (p-2, p-4, p-6, p-8, p-12)
layout.mobile_constraints: max-w-md mx-auto w-full h-full shadow-2xl relative

giant_start_button.classes: w-64 h-64 rounded-full bg-[#151B26] border-4 border-[#00FFB2] flex flex-col items-center justify-center relative group transition-all duration-300

time_bar.container: w-full h-2 bg-[#151B26] rounded-full overflow-hidden mt-4
time_bar.fill: h-full bg-[#00FFB2] transition-all duration-1000 ease-linear shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(0,255,178,0.8)]

word_input.input_field: w-full bg-transparent border-b-2 border-[#2A364D] text-5xl text-center text-white py-4 focus:outline-none focus:border-[#00FFB2] transition-colors duration-300 font-bold tracking-widest

title_badge.container: inline-flex items-center px-4 py-2 rounded-full bg-[#151B26] border border-[#2A364D]

leaderboard_card.container: flex items-center justify-between p-4 mb-3 rounded-2xl bg-[#151B26] border border-[#2A364D] transition-all

tabs.list: flex w-full bg-[#151B26] rounded-full p-1 mb-6
tabs.trigger: flex-1 rounded-full py-3 text-sm font-semibold transition-all data-[state=active]:bg-[#00FFB2] data-[state=active]:text-black text-[#A1B0CC]

animations.haptic_feedback: framer-motion whileTap={{ scale: 0.95 }} transition={{ type: 'spring', stiffness: 400, damping: 17 }}
animations.screen_shake: framer-motion animate={{ x: [-5, 5, -5, 5, 0] }} transition={{ duration: 0.4 }} (for incorrect words)
animations.page_transition: framer-motion initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -20 }}

image_urls.description: Silhouette of man, default player avatar
Abstract neon traffic light dot, alternative avatar
Abstract dark neon streaks, background texture

instructions_to_main_agent: Build this as a mobile-first PWA or responsive web app using max-w-md container to simulate the requested React Native Expo mobile feel.
Implement the 'Dark Mode heavy' look using exactly the deep navy (#0B0E14) and mint green (#00FFB2) neon colors provided.
Use standard Radix/Shadcn UI components but heavily override them. Remove default borders, apply the rounded geometries, and add the neon shadows specified.
In the Game Screen: The time bar must be a fixed UI element at the top that visually decreases from 100% to 0%. Add haptic 'bounce' or 'shake' animations using Framer Motion when entering words.
When a combo happens (e.g. word entered under 3s), activate the 'combo_indicator.screen_edge_glow' class on the main wrapper div to give the user intense visual feedback.
The Home Screen must focus completely on the giant BAŞLA button in the center. Don't clutter the screen.
Install and use 'lucide-react' for all icons (Leaderboard icon, Profile icon, etc).
For the background, use the dark navy color primarily, but you can layer the 'background' image URL from the media array with a very low opacity (e.g., 5-10%) and mix-blend-screen to give it texture.
Data structure for achievements/titles should include: Çaylak (0 pts), Kelime Avcısı (50 pts), Üstad (200 pts), Efsane (500 pts).
